violations.text: The condensate lines are draining into a sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

Sauce, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
Wooden prep table was not in good repair. Inspector observed a large gap. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026
The condensate lines are draining into a sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

The floor and wall junctures throughout the kitchen do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

The door to the outside, located in the back area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) The bottom storage areas of prep units had food residue and debris 2) Area above dish machine had an accumulation of dust New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024
Condensate lines were draining into a unapproved sinks. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024
The floor in the front prep area (under fryers) is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2025
